hero.title: We hire people who think in systems.
hero.lead: Small team. Serious work. Operational problems that most engineering firms won't touch. If you're drawn to complexity and allergic to theatre, you'll fit here.

heroImage.alt: Lexodd team working on operational systems

values.title: What this place is actually like
values.description: No hierarchy for its own sake. You work directly with clients and senior engineers. The expectation is ownership, not task completion. We take on a small number of projects at a time, which means every person goes deep.
values.additional: Most hires come through referrals. We're selective not because we're exclusive, but because the work demands it.

items.title: Diagnosis before design
items.description: We don't build until we understand what's actually broken. If you can't explain why, you shouldn't be designing the solution.

items.title: Fewer clients, deeper work
items.description: You go deep on one or two problems — not shallow across twelve. Better work, faster growth.

items.title: Outcomes, not output
items.description: Every release is judged by whether the operation runs better — not by velocity or ticket count.

cta.title: Write to us directly.
cta.description: If you have a specific capability in systems engineering or operational analysis and you've built things that work in the real world — write to us. Tell us what you've done, not what you're looking for.

jobs.title: Senior Systems Engineer
jobs.desc: You design and build operational platforms end-to-end — from data architecture through production. You're comfortable in ambiguity, uncomfortable with unnecessary complexity.
resp: Architect and build real-time operational systems
Translate operational constraints into precise technical requirements
Lead delivery from design through production stability
Review and shape the work of junior engineers
req: Strong PostgreSQL and distributed systems background
Experience delivering in complex, real-world operational environments
Ability to diagnose problems before designing solutions
